title: Roblox Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Roblox reported strong 2024 financial results with Q4 revenue of $988.2 million, up 32% year-over-year, and bookings of $1,361.6 million, up 21% year-over-year. For the full year 2024, the company reported revenue of $3,602.0 million, up 29% year-over-year, and bookings of $4,369.1 million, up 24% year-over-year. Daily active users averaged 82.9 million in Q4, up 21% year-over-year, with hours engaged reaching 73.5 billion, up 23% year-over-year. The company reported a consolidated net loss of $221.1 million for the quarter and adjusted EBITDA of $65.6 million. Free cash flow increased by 417% to $641.3 million for the full year 2024. Looking ahead, the company provided guidance for strong continued growth. Wall Street analysts had issued 7 buy ratings on RBLX stock, with 0 sell ratings, and price targets from analysts had a median of $64.0. The strong revenue and user growth throughout 2024 demonstrated Roblox's ability to continue scaling its platform despite ongoing profitability challenges.
